description: Vocabulary for the primary-tumor metastasis-niche program eval. The eval asks agents to report gene-expression program directions in the primary pro-metastatic niche.

answer_conventions.metastatic_niche_program_calls: List of objects with keys program and direction. Program values must come from niche_categories and direction values from direction_labels. Direction is relative to non-met-like regions of the same shared primary tumor. Order does not matter.
answer_conventions.rejected_or_ambiguous_programs: Unordered set of candidate niche_categories that the agent determines are not robust primary pro-metastatic gene-expression program changes.
answer_conventions.diagnostics: Optional free-form evidence, including per-layer deltas, layer counts, thresholds, or plots. Diagnostics are not directly scored but are useful for audit.

glossary.collagen_deposition: Collagen/ECM program including Col1a1, Col1a2, Col3a1, Col5a1, Col12a1, Acta2.
glossary.mesothelial_neighborhood: Mesothelial fraction or marker signal in spatial neighborhoods around met-like primary-tumor spots.
glossary.immunosuppressive_macrophage: Macrophage program with immunosuppressive marker genes such as Arg1/Fcgr-family/Spp1-like markers.
glossary.scavenger_macrophage: Macrophage scavenger-receptor program such as Mrc1/Msr1/C1q-like markers.
glossary.TGFb_signaling: Transforming growth factor beta ligand / SMAD signaling program.
